chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 24 of 2025 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on CMA No.4511/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.4512/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.4513/2025. 4. For bearing of main case. 27.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Pannah Maitlo, advocate for the petitioners. Petition assails rights in immovable property. Same is not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Petition is dismissed being mis-conceived. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
